daily.summary: The Sun's current transit of your solar fourth house encourages you to enjoy your personal life, nest, and rest, dear Aries. In the first half of today, however, the Sun forms a minor challenging aspect to Pluto, and circumstances are such that adjustments and refinements to your plans can be necessary. Fears of missing out in your social life or stress can keep you feeling a little wired or on edge. It may be that you're dealing with excessive attachment to or control of a relationship or project. You may have trouble pulling yourself away from your networking activities. Fortunately, as the day advances, you can find it easier to find a better balance. Excitement on the home front may be brewing, which leaves you feeling freer, lighter, and happier. It's easier to make progress as you feel just a little more detached and ready to change.

The Sun's current transit encourages you to seek variety and mental stimulation these days, dear Taurus. Early today, however, worries you've kept at bay about your long-term plans, life path, career, responsibilities, or reputation are the possible root of tensions as the Sun and Pluto form a minor challenging aspect. Instead of giving in to paranoid thinking, aim to focus on weak areas and fix them one step at a time. What's most therapeutic now is a commitment to resolving minor problems systematically. There can be a somewhat obsessive quality to certain aspects of the first half of the day, but as the day advances, it comes more naturally to arrive at a balance. You could receive good news or read something that inspires you to change your learning focus. Inspiration can be found now, and it’s likely to come through your conversations or communications with others.

monthly.summary:
The following are monthly horoscopes for the Taurus zodiac sign. Cafe Astrology divides its monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign.

If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor ourQuick Ascendant Calculator here.

The following are monthly horoscopes for the Taurus zodiac sign. Cafe Astrology divides its monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here.

June is a strong month for efforts to build and fortify important areas of your life, dear Taurus. You might bring recent ideas and endeavors to life and build or develop these projects. With a New Moon in your solar second house on the 14th, you’ll be wanting results, but you’re also very willing to put in the necessary time and energy to achieve your goals.

You're exploring different ways of building your sense of value and worthiness this month. In fact, there can be some wonderful inspiration and imagination surrounding business and finances. You can benefit greatly from natural or earthy activities that renew your connection to the world around you or the world of the five senses. If you’re feeling especially sensitive about your worth or value to others, it’s a time to deal with this bravely but also civilly.

yearly.overview: Jupiter continues to open the lines of communication in your life this year, and later, it boosts your home and family life. Uranus completes its transition out of your sign, helping stabilize your life.
yearly.summary:
Jupiter continues to open the lines of communication in your life this year, and later, it boosts your home and family life. Uranus completes its transition out of your sign, helping stabilize your life.

New interests and learning are powerful themes in 2026, but later this year, there can be a real settling-down process going on in your life. Your domestic world comes into stronger focus, and you can feel the need to expand, grow, and improve. Some may move into larger or more appropriate accommodations, while others work on improving their living conditions. You are likely to find more value – and joy – in your family and your domestic life.

The first half of the year is rich in opportunities to expand your knowledge and make pleasant contact with others. There can be a real feeling of connectedness with friends, siblings, your neighborhood, or your community. Interests expand. Communications projects are well-starred, and you might secure, complete, or refine a major project. Transportation matters can improve.

With Uranus leaving your sign in April (permanently this time), you’re likely to feel less on edge, rebellious, or triggered. You no longer feel the need to make a splash when it comes to asserting your independence. Relationships also begin to settle down. You’re closing an important chapter in your life. Uranus was in Taurus for many years, pushing you to find yourself.

As Uranus embarks on its lengthy journey through your resources sector, freelance work or various sources of revenue can be a theme. Connecting with your longer-term, overarching goals can lead to a new relationship with your money and things. With Saturn leaving your sector of business earnings this year and Uranus moving into your money sector, there can be a theme of freedom from restrictions on earnings or a changing money landscape.

It can be a time of some upheaval and unpredictability, but also of innovation and progress with matters of income, personal things, comfort, and security. Whether money means freedom to you or freedom is about detachment from certain possessions, this is a time of an evolving relationship with your material affairs.

Dreams are vibrant and involved this year. You pay more attention to synchronicities, signs, symbols, and omens in your life. You are building your faith in all that is “unseen.” In truth, there can be a lot of work done behind the scenes. While supporting others or dealing with problems in your private time can be draining at times, this can be an important time for facing fears and letting go of old attachments.

There can be family expansions or activities that sometimes clash with your need for independence or with your personal or professional plans. The demands of career and family can be especially strong, and finding a balance is challenging but also important, especially in July. This year, you’re battling tension about performance and reputation as you discover your ambitions. However, you mustn’t let this stress reach a level that interferes with your enjoyment of opportunities.

Overall, the year spotlights innovative or technological improvements, new ideas, and a forward-looking, happy energy with finances and home life. Loans or support may be forthcoming. A partner could be doing quite well at this time, helping your overall financial picture.

What you value the most is changing, and as this evolves, you’re building your confidence for more expressive periods to come. Major new projects begun from mid-2026 to mid-2027 can turn out to be very rewarding, profitable, and long-term, so lay down your foundations well.

daily.summary: In the first half of the day, something can be on your mind, dear Gemini, or you may have to navigate disagreements about spending, values, and respect. There can be an inner battle as you question yourself or your recent choices. If people are unhappy and you feel caught in the middle, try to think up strategies for choosing a side or taking a stand, as playing both (or many) sides only complicates your life further. However, the day advances with a stronger sense of freedom. Special insight into your finances, exciting money-making ideas, or deeper insights into your self-worth can be pleasantly in focus. You can feel as if a burden has been lifted from you, and you feel freer to enjoy yourself and more confident in your worth and value.

We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor ourQuick Ascendant Lookup.

Monthly horoscopes are divided into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here.

With the Sun in your sign for the first three weeks of June, dear Gemini, all eyes are on you! Even so, Mars doesn't reach Gemini until the 28th, so your energy levels may be low, and you could be feeling on the fence about several matters, after which you confidently and perhaps aggressively go after what you want.

The month ahead is one of your yearly "new beginnings" or fresh start. You have a New Moon occurring on the 14th, but Mars is still quiet in your privacy sector until the 28th, making going after what you want a little more complicated than you might expect. At the same time, you're drawing positive attention and are well-positioned to attend to your personal plans and needs in June.

Mercury is in your finances sector from the 1st onward, Venus is there until the 13th, and the Sun is there from the 21st onward. As such, June is a notable month for making money or attracting the right resources your way. Still, it gets a bit complicated with Mercury retrograde from the 29th onward and in its shadow from the 12th. Picking and choosing your projects carefully may be a good idea.

daily.summary: In the first of the day, watch for vague problems based on fears of betrayal, jealousy, or resentment, dear Cancer, as the Sun and Pluto form a minor challenging aspect. There can be a trigger of an unresolved, pre-existing issue. While you don't want to have the rug pulled from under you, obsessing over a situation won't necessarily protect you from changes. In fact, it's better to work on an area of over-attachment than to worry about losing it. Fortunately, the day advances with a stronger feeling of balance, and perhaps some exciting motivation. Transits raise your spirits. You could feel a need to update, refresh, and renew yourself, projects, circumstances, and connections.

yearly.overview: It’s an exciting year for you, dear Cancer. You have expansive Jupiter in your sign until mid-year. If you haven’t taken advantage of its gifts and blessings, it’s now time to do so. It’s an ideal period for a very positive new personal beginning and awakening. You enjoy increased confidence, along with the confidence of others in you. Your personality, image, body image, and morale expand to new levels, and you see whole new possibilities. The year also involves you more intensely with your work or status and material goals. Career winds are shifting!
yearly.summary:
It’s an exciting year for you, dear Cancer. You have expansive Jupiter in your sign until mid-year. If you haven’t taken advantage of its gifts and blessings, it’s now time to do so. It’s an ideal period for a very positive new personal beginning and awakening. You enjoy increased confidence, along with the confidence of others in you. Your personality, image, body image, and morale expand to new levels, and you see whole new possibilities. The year also involves you more intensely with your work or status and material goals. Career winds are shifting!

You are doing your professional and public life quite differently this year, and you are capable of solid success. A deliberate, steady pace is important when pursuing your career, reputation, and life path goals. Certainly, there can be more pressure in these areas. Transits bring your responsibilities to the “outside world” to light, and at times, to the test. It’s a pivotal period for you regarding the structures you’ve built and your career or reputation.

This can be a time of achievement, recognition, new responsibilities, and harvest on career fronts. Others are taking you more seriously, which can be rewarding, but at times stressful. It can also be a time when poor past decisions come to light. It’s best to follow the rules and get organized.

Your increased personal confidence gives you more freedom to do what you want and experience life on a “new and improved” level. The second half of 2026 brings new and quite remarkable energy to your finances, personal possessions, as well as your sense of comfort and security. There is a stronger focus on the simple pleasures and comforts of life, though you might also have your eye on something expensive or indulgent. It’s actually a good time to make larger, significant purchases, generally speaking, and within reason. Earnings might expand now, but it’s very important to be grateful at this time in your life.

Look to develop, but don’t overreach. Excess can trip you up at a time when you have real, solid opportunities to improve your lot in life. Depending on what you want at this time in your life, it can be a time of more business or more leisure – whichever helps you feel content and leads to a feeling of abundance.

From April 25th onward, your social life evens out and steadies after years of a bit of turbulence or unreliability. Ideally, you’ve met some inspiring people and learned a great deal more about your associations and which ones represented you well. A new cycle begins that can stir up your private life (your private life becomes more “colorful” now), and interjects some unusual coincidences into your life.

It’s a process that slowly but surely detaches you from elements of your past that have limited your growth. This may be a time of radical changes in alliances and allegiances. Aim to free yourself from outdated ideas and attitudes that are keeping you attached to unhealthy paths.

In general, you are moving towards deeper thinking and the desire for depth and maturity in your connections to others. There may be some drama related to debts, shared assets, dependencies, or power dynamics in a relationship. Balancing your attention to your career or reputation with your attention to your private life and downtime can boost both areas of life. There can be breakthroughs on a psychological or intimate level, giving you a solid sense that you’re moving forward.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

For Cancer, learning and teaming up with others through study groups or friendships based on shared beliefs and interests can benefit you. It’s a good time to draw some boundaries and cement long-term friendships or group associations, while also allowing room for spontaneity and a sense of freedom. There is a real sense that as you build your skills and attend to your practical affairs, you’ll connect with people or causes that inspire and encourage you.

daily.summary: The Sun's current transit encourages you to take extra time to decompress and replenish your energy these days, dear Leo. However, in the first half of the day, it forms an awkward angle with Pluto, and there can be temporary obstacles to rest and healing. With Pluto in your seventh house, it can be about fears of changes in a relationship. It's best not to get caught up in emotional game-playing. There can be a feeling that you have to go around an issue instead of coming right out with it, but don't be afraid to explore your feelings before presenting them. You might consider ways to protect yourself from gossip, as private matters might come to light. However, it's also essential to treat the source, which can be guilt or fears about past issues. This way, if problems surface, you'll be much better equipped to manage or address them. As the day advances, it's far easier to listen to your intuition, particularly regarding matters that have held you back from growing. You can feel good about letting go of outdated behaviors.

monthly.summary:
Cafe Astrology monthly horoscopes are divided into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember thatif you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. In fact, these horoscopes are even more helpful if read for your rising sign (Ascendant).

If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor the Cafe Astrology quickAscendant Lookup.

We’ve divided our 2026 monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember thatif you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign.

In fact, these horoscopes are even more helpful if read for your rising sign (Ascendant). If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor the Cafe Astrology quickAscendant Calculator.

Friendships and group associations can often be a focal point for you in June, dear Leo. Around the New Moon on the 14th, interesting opportunities for friendships and partnerships can arise suddenly. Venus enters your sign on the 13th, and this ups your powers of attraction considerably. If you've been on the fence about your feelings or a love relationship, this may be the time when you become clearer and more demonstrative. It's also a time to attract positive attention.

yearly.overview: A powerful year is ahead for you, dear Leo. Jupiter will move into your sign mid-year, sparking a personal new beginning of sorts and upping your personal magnetism to new heights. Until then, you are in a strong period for healing and doing inner work.
yearly.summary:
A powerful year is ahead for you, dear Leo. Jupiter will move into your sign mid-year, sparking a personal new beginning of sorts and upping your personal magnetism to new heights. Until then, you are in a strong period for healing and doing inner work.

In the first half of 2026, you’re especially drawn to your inner world. This period offers a sense of security in introspection. You might sometimes prefer to keep to yourself, where it seems safer and happier, but you can also be a pillar of support for others. It doesn’t feel like a time for major changes or decisions. In reality, you’re in a phase of significant soul-searching, questioning your approaches and paths, and it’s a valuable process.

It’s a powerful period for healing and serving – and thoroughly enjoying the process! There is, however, a tendency to overdo escapism, which should be watched. Perhaps your most important work in early 2026 is finding peace with the past, which will free you up for better enjoyment of the Jupiter-in-Leo transit that begins on June 30th and runs well into 2027.

July ushers in Jupiter into your sign, and you’re coming into your own–and into the light. The second half of the year is about awakening. Your desire to truly live life, rather than simply go through the motions, takes over. You project yourself with more confidence, and you’re letting go of past, more immature behavior patterns and becoming especially comfortable in your own skin. You’re improving your personal presentation in some manner. Personal pleasures, freedom, self-expression, and creativity are big on your list of priorities.

Exciting energy is with you in your love life. What is most important to you at this point in your life is a meeting of minds. In the first half of the year, love may be on the complicated side. There may be a relationship that is private or sacrificial in some manner. From mid-year forward, there is a romantic revelation, blossoming, or awakening. It’s also a strong time for adventure, education, and recognition of your creative talents.

A long-term cycle that’s influenced your career for many years is coming to an end in April. With this cycle’s end, dramatic ups and downs in your career path tend to subside. You’ll enjoy more predictability with your reputation, profession, life path, or status. Your aspirations begin to evolve. The cycle that starts as this one ends is bound to shake up your social circle. Some friendships may be left behind, and new ones made, although they may not be quite as reliable as the ones you had in the past. You may be moving with a new or different crowd in the years ahead. You are less prone to rebel in 2026 and more inclined to live authentically.

A new theme is weaving into your life this year, starting with the Solar Eclipse in February. Especially from the last week of July onward, your personality and partnerships can evolve. Your definitions of “me” and “you” are transforming. Issues of personal courage, confidence, and independence come to the fore. In particular, the North Node in your partnership sector from July onward nudges you toward better balancing and understanding your needs for independence and partnership, with an emphasis on improving negotiations, compromise, and one-on-one connecting.

With both Saturn and Neptune visiting your spirit sector starting early in the year, it’s a powerful time for special attention to courses or training, as well as for your voice! People are very interested in what you have to share. You’ll be firming up (and perhaps putting to the test) your beliefs or educational pursuits. Your attitude, outlook, and worldview are evolving in 2026. Life begins to feel more stable and directed, and your increased self-awareness puts you in a better position to make better decisions.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

For Leo, your special attention to structure and discipline, combined with some room for spontaneity and innovation, can help boost your career or reputation. You see definite improvements in your life as you relinquish rigidity and pressure while sticking with reliability and order. Getting your finances and support situation sorted out can motivate and inspire your work. This period rewards attention to practical and emotional needs, and fulfilling pursuits can result.

daily.summary: You're paying more attention to your happiness goals these days, dear Virgo, but while you're more hopeful than usual, energies in the first half of the day are on the tense side, and you might want to watch for fear-based decisions. You have many reasons to feel more engaged these days, but there can be a temporary lull that shouldn't set you back, but that might redirect you a little if you require change. Staying on top of a health or work pursuit can be another source of tension as you attempt to oversee or manage too many life departments. Letting go of control may be necessary, even if it's just a little bit or for a short time. While a work concern or obligation may nag at you, the day moves forward with greater balance. Approaching your social life a little differently can be surprisingly enjoyable.

You're in an important cycle for career and responsibilities, dear Libra, but today's energies may pull you back a little. The Sun, currently at the top of your solar chart, forms a minor challenging aspect with Pluto, creating a temporary slowdown in the first half of today. Ideally, it helps direct your attention to areas where you can make improvements. Certainly, there may be more substantial demands on your time, leaving you with fewer opportunities to pursue your interests. You might also worry about things that you can't truly control. You can be quite concerned about meeting your responsibilities or living up to others' standards. It's best to use this energy to develop plans and schemes that help you overcome fears and concerns rather than letting them drag you down. Doing so can free you up to take advantage of the day's opportunities. As the day advances, your approach becomes more confident. You could feel especially "in sync" as things seem to fall into place.

The desire for more freedom is strong these days, dear Scorpio, with an emphasis on your spirit sector. In the first half of today, emotions are complicated, and self-limitation can be an issue. People may be trying to pull your strings, or you could be wrestling with your fear of making a change now as the Sun and Pluto form an awkward aspect. Let mysteries unravel slowly rather than push something that isn't ready to reveal itself. If you're stuck in the same place, either physically or emotionally, aim to feed your restless spirit with something mentally refreshing. Remember that you're more inclined to blow an issue out of proportion if you're feeling overwhelmed, so aim to reduce stress and gain a little perspective. Complicated feelings aside, the day advances with a surprising boost. Exciting new experiences, insights, and ideas can be appealing. Experiences now nudge you out of your routine in pleasant, rewarding ways.

This is a generally good time for building life strategies and learning more about your motivations and inner drives, dear Sagittarius, with the Sun's current transit. However, in the first half of the day, a Sun-Pluto aspect might signal you're overthinking things. Concerns related to communication, daily affairs, and staying on top of learning or personal interests can figure prominently. You don't want to be out of the loop, but pulling yourself away sometimes is a must. Take care of yourself and take a break from overthinking. Try not to let a desire to control things interfere with self-understanding or a close relationship. Fortunately, the day advances with a stronger sense of freedom. You could have sudden insights and opportunities for emotional renewal or healing that give you a sense of self-mastery.

The Sun in your partnership sector these days brings a sociable, friendly, and compromising theme to your life, dear Capricorn. It's a good time to improve your relationships. In the first half of today, however, the Sun forms minor challenging aspects, and it may be difficult to distinguish between rebellious feelings and a genuine need for independence and freedom, but learning this difference will strengthen you. The tendency runs high to dwell on matters that have no immediate resolution, but it's better to focus on what you can control and to work on problems one step at a time. Try not to let worry about your resources, means, or money take over your day. As the day advances, you're more likely to move on, although relationship needs can come on suddenly. It's a time to connect with desires or cravings you never knew you had.

monthly.summary:
Monthly horoscopes are divided into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. An overview of the month’s themes is provided, along with more specific transits of the Sun, Mercury, Venus, Mars, eclipses (if they occur this month), and retrograde activity.

Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here. Aquick Ascendant lookup tool can be found here.

We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here, or useCafe Astrology’s Ascendant Calculator.

Work and health matters are in sharper focus in June, dear Capricorn, and coming to a better balance or state of order is a theme. Organizing, chores, and health pursuits are favored, and a new project or commitment to wellness can be in the works, especially after the New Moon on the 14th.

Putting in the effort to improve your daily routines is enjoyable, and it can feel good to rise to a challenge, especially one of your own making. You enjoy helping others, and people tend to be grateful for it. Still, you’re gravitating to activities and projects that bring intrinsic rewards. Your approach can be on-and-off, but when you're "on," you go the extra distance. You might also be exploring alternative therapies and approaches to health and fitness.

yearly.overview: The following full yearly horoscope for Capricorn includes an overview and summary, outer plant influences, and major aspects (such as the Saturn-Uranus sextile) in 2026 and how they specifically affect Capricorn, and horoscopes divided into decans.
yearly.summary:
The following full yearly horoscope for Capricorn includes an overview and summary, outer plant influences, and major aspects (such as the Saturn-Uranus sextile) in 2026 and how they specifically affect Capricorn, and horoscopes divided into decans.

Significant partnerships and relationships can be a strong focus this year, and you can enjoy opportunities to improve a close relationship or enter into a new partnership. People tend to be supportive of you, and you can find much joy with a special someone. Some of you could be entering profitable business partnerships. There can be new levels of intimacy from mid-2026 onward, and great pleasure in being close to someone. New depths (and heights) can be experienced in a relationship this year, which can add to your inner glow.

Eclipses this year encourage you to pay special attention to how you communicate, connect, and present your ideas. Polishing these things will go a long way towards your happiness and fulfillment. This can also be a time for boosting a relationship with a sibling, classmate, or neighbor. More involvement and improvement figure strongly.

However, you’re also beginning to pay special attention to your income, resources, valuables, and natural talents as a new eclipse set moves in. Getting your assets sorted can be an important focus. With money or things, you can be going through restructuring, possibly putting some business projects to rest. You can be very resourceful when it comes to recycling or using what you already own in different ways. You might find unique products to sell and market.

While Saturn is asking you to be responsible in your domestic world, Uranus wants you to find a more authentic approach to your job, daily life, and routines. This can be tricky at times, but manageable. You’re moving toward a fresh approach to your work and the daily details of your life. Irregular schedules and perhaps some disruptions and tensions are possible this year as you adjust to this influence that’s with you from April 25th onward. Your working hours may become non-traditional, or a job may be unconventional. You are restless with routines and tend to answer to your own internal rhythm rather than paying attention to society’s (and nature’s!) rhythms. Work that is limiting or lifeless drags you down more than usual.

During this new cycle that will stick with you for about seven years, it would be wise to do work or enjoy routines that offer you not only variety and stimulation but also the chance to invent and create. You may also be interested in alternative health methods. You could benefit greatly from yoga or other mind-body therapies now.

It’s also interesting to note that Uranus is leaving your sector of romance and creativity for good in April this year, since it’s been such a long-term influence. This can point to some settling down and greater reliability in romance, relationships with your children, creative projects, and hobbies, whichever is applicable.

Focusing on compassion and intuition as tools to help you better understand yourself and others, particularly family, can be especially helpful this year, but you’re also in need of more structure and practical attention to your domestic world. Improving your living conditions, self-esteem, and comfort levels are priorities. Some of this process is very internalized–you’re getting in deeper touch with yourself, determining what you truly want from life, what childhood conditioning issues are holding you back, and just how much inner power and strength you possess. A bit of self-absorption seems necessary.

Projects you begin this year may very well last–the very beginnings of long-term businesses or projects might happen for you in 2026. You seek comfort and stability, but also improvement, in your personal life. A more inspired yet practical approach to your domestic world can enrich your life and boost your intimate life or passion projects. It’s a powerful time for long-term financial planning and strengthening your financial picture.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

daily.summary: In the first half of the day, there can be vague worries, guilt, and concerns interfering with your productivity, dear Aquarius. Alternatives might emerge that lead you to question your current plans, goals, or methods. Doubts can weigh on you more than usual with a Sun-Pluto transit, but it's temporary. Consider that the solution can leave you in a better place than before, making a misstep very much worth it. It's best to remind yourself of your priorities. Even with some stalling, you're in good shape for solving practical problems today. While there is a small risk of life feeling too chaotic as you quite suddenly take notice of various flaws and problems, you're in a good position to fix these things if you can center yourself and take things one step at a time. As the day advances, there can be interesting developments in your daily life. You might also feel more open about expressing your unique qualities, particularly in the context of your everyday communications and your work or services.

monthly.summary:
Monthly horoscopes are divided into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. An overview of the month’s influences is provided, as well as more specific transits of the Sun, Mercury, Venus, Mars, and eclipses (if they occur this month), as well as retrograde activity.Aquarius Daily Horoscopesreveal further details.

Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor use ourquick Ascendant lookup toolto get straight to the point!

We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here.

The Sun spends time in your enjoyment sector until the 21st, dear Aquarius, and a New Moon occurs in this same, favorable part of your chart on the 14th, bringing even more power to areas ruled by this sector. These include romance, creativity, hobbies, entertainment, children, and pleasure. Confidence in sharing and expressing yourself more freely is on the upswing. At the same time, your work and health sectors are strong all month, making a good balance very achievable in June.

Relating and creating are big themes for you this month. It's a strong month for exploring creative urges and for sharing your affection, joy, and experiences with others, as you seem to feed off others’ responses.

yearly.overview: Most notable bright areas this year – and there are plenty – are self-care and self-improvement endeavors, work, long-term partnerships, and friendships. Your schedule is likely to be quite full in the first half of the year, but mostly pleasantly so. For those of you in need of work or who want to improve their daily routines or working life, this is a fabulous time to do so, although you’ll need to watch for taking on too much.
yearly.summary:
Most notable bright areas this year – and there are plenty – are self-care and self-improvement endeavors, work, long-term partnerships, and friendships. Your schedule is likely to be quite full in the first half of the year, but mostly pleasantly so. For those of you in need of work or who want to improve their daily routines or working life, this is a fabulous time to do so, although you’ll need to watch for taking on too much.

You may be meeting new friends through the work you do or through your pursuit of health and wellness goals. While you can feel pressure on a personal level, you’re in a strong position for comfortably meeting your responsibilities this year. Finances are less confusing or uncertain in 2026. Transportation and communication issues can be in strong focus as you find more efficient ways to get around and connect.

The second half of the year can be quite excellent for partnerships, whether these are business, romantic, or both. Opportunities for relationships can open up for you. For some, a friendship can move to a whole new level. Negotiations and counseling situations can be beneficial. You might find yourself in a teaching or counseling role or as a trusted advisor. One-to-one counseling sessions can be very helpful. Getting married or entering a new long-term partnership is possible; partnered Aquarians will benefit from infusing their current relationship with more fun, enjoyment, generosity, and vision.

There may have been times when you felt you were alone and in charge, but in 2026, that’s changing. People who have your interests at heart or who uplift you can enter your life, or existing relationships can improve significantly. There can be great innovations in your life, with new ways to communicate and move your life forward. There can be a lot of activity with writing, public speaking, new interests, and exciting friendships. You’ll require stimulating or simply new and different entertainment.

With Pluto in your sign, you are learning about your personal power, sometimes through challenging life lessons and experiences. The temptation may be to attempt to control or micro-manage things, but you’ll better experience your own freedom if you can resist this urge.

Saturn and Neptune moving out of your finance sector early in 2026 takes pressure and restriction off money matters. Your relationship with your money and things has evolved, and you’re now less inhibited about expressing your natural talents. This theme is helped further as Uranus, your modern planetary ruler, heads into your creativity sector on April 25th for a visit of about seven years. It’s a powerful time to connect with and explore your creativity.

The long-term cycle that brought change and unpredictability to your home and family life ends this year on April 25th. This shift takes quite a bit of pressure off. At the same time, a new cycle begins, and creatively speaking, you’re blossoming as you discover new and unique forms of creative or playful expression.

Uranus in your solar fifth house is a relative newcomer and a long-term guest, bringing excitement – perhaps even thrills – but also possible instability in romance and creative output from time to time. You’re discovering your inner child and getting in touch with your creative muse, and there can be some ups and downs in the process. These things are not something you can schedule or control! You may be attracting unusual, progressive, alternative, or erratic people into your world now, particularly on a romantic level. You may also need to deal with matters of independence and personal freedom with your children or in your dating life, if applicable. All in all, however, this is a wonderful transit for loosening you up and encouraging a more casual, natural, and creative approach to expressing yourself.

Eclipses this year put special focus on spending habits — emphasizing the need to take charge of your finances —and on your relationships with others — spotlighting the need to find a balance between independence and your need for other people in your life.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

daily.summary: You're exploring avenues for expressing yourself or considering more forms of entertainment these days, dear Pisces, with the Sun's current transit. However, in the first half of today, it's important not to force anything. It's better to let things flow smoothly. Brooding or dwelling on unresolved matters from your past can interfere with your enjoyment of the present. Managing feelings of being overwhelmed can involve focusing on smaller problems and then working your way up. Examine your fears, but don't dwell on them for the best results. Do your best to let go of suspicion and negative thinking. As the day advances, it's much easier to loosen up. You're more inclined to take chances on creative or romantic levels. Something might inspire you to try a new creative hobby or adventure altogether.
